summary: Production UAT (User Acceptance Testing) completed for www.visionary-suite.com. Tested all 10 phases covering public pages, authentication, dashboard, core features, creator tools, user features, admin panel, UI/UX, navigation, and forms. All major functionality working correctly.

pages_tested.notes: Hero section, trust badges (4.9/5 Rating, 5,000+ Creators), feature cards, CTA buttons, live stats banner (12 creators online)
4 subscription plans (Weekly ₹199, Monthly ₹699, Quarterly ₹1999, Yearly ₹5999), 3 credit packs, currency selector
4.7 average rating, user testimonials with star ratings, Verified User badges
Full contact form, Contact Information panel, Response Time info
Email/Password fields, Forgot password link, Google sign-in, Sign up link
100 free credits banner, name/email/password fields, password requirements shown, Security Verification checkbox

tests.notes: Login successful! toast shown, redirected to /app
Login successful! Admin Panel button visible

Generate Reel Script (10 credits), Create Kids Story Pack (10 credits)
Quick tools: Reaction GIF, Coloring Book, Tone Switcher, Challenge Gen
Story Episode Creator, Content Challenge Planner, Caption Rewriter Pro - all REBUILT

Comic Avatar (15 credits) and Comic Strip (25 credits) modes

Generate From Story (10 credits) or Convert Photos (5 credits)

Referral code, Copy/Share buttons, stats, Tier Progress (Bronze→Platinum)

Today's Logins (19), Who's Online Now section

25 users, Reset/Unlimited actions, Create User button
1,401 Total Logins, 93.9% Success Rate, Export CSV

issues: Terms link text says 'Terms' but could be more specific 'Terms of Service' for clarity

additional_components_verified.OWASP_Badge: Protected by OWASP Standards badge in footer

critical_code_review_comments: All 8 public pages loading correctly with proper content
Authentication flow working seamlessly for both regular and admin users
Dashboard displays all feature cards with correct credit costs
All 10+ creator tools accessible and forms render correctly
Admin panel fully functional with comprehensive monitoring dashboards
UI/UX consistent with dark theme, proper spacing, and responsive elements
Daily Rewards system working with streak tracking and claim functionality
Footer contains all required links and OWASP security badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Production UAT completed on www.visionary-suite.com. All major functionality verified: public pages, auth flow, dashboard, core features (Reel/Story/Photo-to-Comic/GIF/Comic-Storybook), creator tools (Bio Generator, Reply Bank, Bedtime Story, Thumbnail, Brand Story, Offer, Story Hook, Viral Ideas), user features (Billing, History, Downloads, Profile, Daily Rewards, Referral), admin panel (Analytics, User Activity, System Health, Environment Monitor, User Management, Login Activity, Audit Logs, Account Locks). No critical issues found.
